hypothesis: E1 grid-edge check: champion v2's tv=0.18 sits on a robust plateau. On the wider grid tv in {0.21,0.24,0.27,0.30} x lb in {20,60,120} (real SPY, 2000->2025-07-11 walk-forward, 0.15% costs), performance degrades smoothly toward v1 as tv rises, and NO wider config beats v2's walk-forward mean Sharpe by more than 0.05.
success_criteria: PASS (v2 robust) if max(wider-grid mean WF Sharpe) - v2 mean WF Sharpe <= 0.05 AND v2 mean WF Sharpe >= v1 mean WF Sharpe. FAIL flags tv=0.18 as a grid-edge artifact -> log finding; champion stays frozen in Phase 2 regardless.

hypothesis: E2 VIX de-risking overlay on frozen v2 (Phase-2 risk-overlay lane): scaling v2 exposure by {0.5, 0.0} when VIX exceeds its rolling 3-year {70th,80th,90th} percentile improves worst walk-forward MaxDD by >=2pts without lowering mean WF Sharpe by >0.02. Skeptical prior: literature says high VIX precedes HIGH returns, so expect failure.
success_criteria: ADOPT overlay only if: mean WF Sharpe >= v2's - 0.02 AND worst-fold MaxDD improves >= 2pts AND deflated Sharpe (2020-2025H, all 6 trials) >= 0.95 AND bootstrap diff-vs-SPY CI clears zero AND MaxDD not >10% worse than incumbent. Otherwise DISCARD.

notes: Hypothesis PASSED: tv=0.18 is a plateau, not a grid-edge artifact (all 12 wider configs mean WF Sharpe 0.81-0.84, none exceeds v2). No config change adopted -- champion stays frozen; 'discarded' = no new configuration crowned.

All 6 VIX-overlay configs DISCARDED. Best (p90/scale0.5) misses pre-registered DD bar (1.27 < 2pts), DSR 0.9455 < 0.95, diff-vs-SPY CI straddles zero. Matches skeptical prior: high VIX precedes high returns; full de-risking (scale 0) was worst everywhere.

hypothesis: Antonacci (2014) Dual Momentum combining absolute momentum (best equity vs SHY T-bill bar) and relative momentum (SPY/QQQ/DIA) with TLT as defensive harbor achieves OOS deflated-Sharpe >= 0.95 for 6 trials, and bootstrap diff-vs-SPY Sharpe CI excluding zero on 2020-2025H fold.
success_criteria: DSR >= 0.95 (penalized for 6 configs) AND bootstrap diff-vs-SPY CI lower bound > 0.0 on 2020-2025H AND worst-fold MaxDD <= -30% (looser than v2 because TLT acts as defensive harbor in bear markets).

hypothesis: A drawdown kill-switch overlay on frozen v2 (go-to-cash at kill_dd, re-enter at recovery_dd) reduces worst-fold MaxDD by >= 2pp without dropping any single-fold Sharpe by > 0.08 relative to v2 baseline.
success_criteria: worst-fold MaxDD improves >= 2pp vs v2 AND no single fold Sharpe drops > 0.08 AND DSR >= 0.95 for 4 configs.

hypothesis: Cross-sectional momentum on S&P sector ETFs (top-N by 12-1 month momentum, equal-weight) achieves OOS deflated-Sharpe >= 0.95 for 4 trials and bootstrap diff-vs-SPY CI excluding zero on 2020-2025H.
success_criteria: DSR >= 0.95 AND diff-vs-SPY CI lower bound > 0.0 on 2020-2025H AND worst-fold MaxDD <= -35% (sector strategies carry more idiosyncratic DD).
